title: rubus villicaulis subsp. stereacanthos
intro: Rubus villicaulis subsp. stereacanthos, also known as the Blackberry or Blackthorn, is a species of bramble that is a type of flowering plant in the rose family, Rosaceae. This plant is primarily known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Rubus villicaulis subsp. stereacanthos include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as aiding in the treatment of digestive issues and certain types of cancer. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
